78" x 47" display area PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Retractable Banner Stands for Trade Show & Professional Display

The Retractor Lite 47 delivers the perfect balance of economy and quality for your trade show and business display needs. This professional retractable banner stand features a lighter duty retractor mechanism, making it ideal for occasional trade show displays, seasonal promotions, and business advertising.

Key features include:

  • Double pole support system for enhanced stability during display
  • 78" x 47" display area for maximum visual impact
  • Professional retractor mechanism for smooth setup and takedown
  • Portable design perfect for trade shows and business events
  • Durable construction for repeated use at multiple events

This banner stand system includes both the retractor hardware and your custom printed 78" x 47" banner, providing a complete display solution for your business or event needs.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Stand Materials for Trade Show Graphics

Choose from premium material options designed specifically for retractable banner stand displays. Each material is optimized for professional indoor use and provides excellent print quality for your custom graphics.

Premium Vinyl Options for Banner Stand Displays

13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors: Our most standard banner material, rated for both indoor and outdoor use. Provides excellent durability and vibrant color reproduction for professional displays.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors: High quality prints with a smooth matte finish. Engineered specifically for retractable banner applications to minimize curling and ensure flat display.

Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Retractors: Premium fabric material with matte finish and vibrant colors. Provides a sophisticated appearance ideal for upscale trade show environments.

Important Size Information: Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). For precision requirements, consult with our Customer Service Representatives.

Request a free sample packet of materials to see and feel the quality before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Finishing & Hardware Options for Professional Setup

Your retractable banner stand includes professional finishing and premium hardware components designed for reliable trade show and business use.

Complete Hardware Package Includes:

  • Professional retractor mechanism with smooth operation
  • Double pole support system for enhanced stability
  • Durable aluminum construction for repeated use
  • Professional banner attachment system
  • Compact carrying case for transport and storage

Professional Finishing Process:

  • Precision cutting to exact banner dimensions
  • Professional hemming and reinforcement
  • Banner attachment hardware installation
  • Quality inspection before shipping

All banner stands are professionally assembled and tested before shipping to ensure proper operation at your event or business location.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

Professional production schedules available to meet your event deadlines and business needs.

Express Production Options

2 Business Days Express: Fast-track production for urgent trade shows and last-minute events. Premium rush service with priority processing.

Standard Production Timeline

3 Business Days Standard: Our most popular production option, providing excellent quality with reliable turnaround times for most business needs.

Economy Production Schedule

5 Business Days Saver: Cost-effective production timeline ideal for advance planning and budget-conscious projects.

Production Notes: Production times begin after artwork approval and order confirmation. Rush options available for trade show deadlines. Contact customer service for specific event date requirements.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Stand Payment & Ordering Options

Flexible payment solutions designed for business customers and individual purchasers.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • All major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal for secure online transactions
  • Business accounts with NET terms available
  • Purchase orders accepted for qualified business customers

Business Account Benefits:

  • NET 30 payment terms for qualified businesses
  • Volume pricing for multiple banner stands
  • Dedicated account management
  • Streamlined reordering process

All transactions are processed through secure, encrypted payment systems. Business account applications are typically processed within 24-48 hours.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Banner Stand Delivery

Professional shipping services to deliver your banner stands safely to trade shows, businesses, and events nationwide.

Banner Stand Shipping Guidelines

Banner stands are carefully packaged in protective shipping containers to prevent damage during transport. Each unit includes the retractor hardware and printed banner, professionally packed for safe delivery.

Packaging Details:

  • Protective foam padding around retractor mechanism
  • Banner rolled and secured to prevent creasing
  • Durable shipping carton designed for banner stands
  • All hardware components secured and protected

Available Shipping Methods

Standard Ground: Cost-effective shipping for most locations, typically 3-7 business days.

Expedited Shipping: Faster delivery options available for trade show deadlines.

Direct-to-Event Shipping: Ship directly to convention centers and event venues with proper scheduling.

Tracking information provided for all shipments. Signature confirmation available upon request for high-value orders.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Business Display Uses for Retractable Banner Stands

Retractable banner stands provide versatile display solutions for numerous professional and business applications.

Trade Show Applications:

  • Booth displays and backdrop graphics
  • Product announcements and launches
  • Company branding and messaging
  • Directional signage and wayfinding

Business & Retail Uses:

  • Storefront promotions and sales announcements
  • Lobby displays and welcome messages
  • Conference room presentations
  • Reception area branding

Event Applications:

  • Corporate meetings and seminars
  • Job fairs and recruiting events
  • Grand openings and celebrations
  • Educational presentations and workshops

The portable design and professional appearance make retractable banner stands ideal for any situation requiring temporary, high-impact displays that can be set up and taken down quickly.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Professional artwork specifications to ensure optimal print quality for your retractable banner stand graphics.

File Format Guidelines

Vector-based file types produce the best results for banner stand graphics:

  • .EPS files with fonts converted to outlines (recommended)
  • High-resolution .PDF files at 300 DPI minimum
  • .JPG files at high resolution for photographic content
  • .AI files with embedded fonts and images

Artwork Specifications

  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum, 300 DPI recommended
  • Color Mode: CMYK for optimal print reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed on all sides
  • Safe Area: Keep important text 0.25" from edges

Professional Design Assistance

Our professional graphic designers are available to help optimize your artwork for banner stand printing. Services include:

  • File format conversion and optimization
  • Color correction and enhancement
  • Layout adjustments for banner dimensions
  • Custom design creation from your concepts

Proof Options Available

Quality assurance options to ensure your banner meets expectations:

  • Digital Proofs: Email preview of your design before printing
  • Hard Copy Proofs: Physical proof printed on actual material
  • Color Match Proofs: Precise color matching for brand compliance
PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Retractable Banner Stands for Your Next Event

Ready to create professional displays that make an impact? Our retractable banner stands combine quality construction, vibrant graphics, and reliable performance for all your trade show and business needs.

Complete Package Includes:

  • Professional retractor hardware with double pole support
  • Custom printed 78" x 47" banner in your choice of materials
  • Protective carrying case for transport
  • Setup instructions and support

Three Easy Ways to Get Started:

Upload Your Print-Ready Design

Have professional artwork ready? Upload your files directly and we'll handle the printing and assembly.

Choose from Professional Templates

Select from our extensive template library and customize with your business information, logos, and messaging.

Work with Our Design Team

Our professional graphic designers will create custom artwork based on your specifications and brand guidelines.

All banner stands are produced using professional-grade materials and printing processes, ensuring your displays look exceptional and perform reliably at every event. Fast turnaround times available to meet your deadlines.

Questions about materials, artwork, or shipping? Our banner specialists are standing by to help you create the perfect display solution for your business needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Banner Stands

What's included with my retractable banner stand order?

Your complete package includes the retractor hardware with double pole support, your custom printed 78" x 47" banner, and a protective carrying case for transport and storage.

How long does production take for custom banner stands?

We offer multiple production timelines: 2 business days for express orders, 3 business days for standard production, and 5 business days for economy pricing. Production begins after artwork approval.

What file formats work best for banner stand artwork?

Vector files like .EPS with outlined fonts produce the best results. We also accept high-resolution .PDF and .JPG files at 300 DPI. Our design team can help optimize your files if needed.

Can I use my banner stand outdoors?

The Retractor Lite 47 is designed primarily for indoor use at trade shows, businesses, and events. For outdoor applications, consider our weighted outdoor banner stand options.

How do I set up my retractable banner stand?

Setup is simple: extend the double poles, attach the top rail, and pull the banner up from the base. The retractor mechanism holds the banner in place. Full instructions are included with your order.

What's your size guarantee for printed banners?

Due to the temperature-sensitive nature of vinyl materials, we allow up to 1/2 inch variance per linear foot. For applications requiring precise sizing, please discuss your needs with our customer service team.

Do you offer quantity discounts for multiple banner stands?

Yes, volume pricing is available for orders of multiple banner stands. Business accounts also qualify for NET 30 payment terms and additional discounts.

Can you ship directly to my trade show or event venue?

Absolutely. We offer direct-to-event shipping to convention centers and venues. Provide the event details and we'll coordinate timing to ensure your banner stands arrive when needed.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
